profile: User gwen.park@umbrella.example has performed 1058 actions across 2 application(s): oracle_cx_sales and oracle_scm_order_mgmt. In oracle_cx_sales they regularly create_lead (daily, around 9-10 AM), update_opportunity (daily, around 9-10 AM), and win_opportunity (weekly, around 7-8 PM). In oracle_scm_order_mgmt they regularly create_sales_order (weekly, around 7-8 PM). Across applications, win_opportunity in oracle_cx_sales is usually followed by create_sales_order in oracle_scm_order_mgmt (within 12 minutes, 100% of the time). By default, when performing create_lead they typically use suite=Oracle CX and module=Sales; when performing update_opportunity they typically use suite=Oracle CX and module=Sales; when performing create_sales_order they typically use suite=Oracle Fusion SCM, module=Order Management, and workflow=opportunity_to_order.
